arts.ttl: Arsenal surely have to step up transfer efforts as star stretchered off vs Man United
arts.sum: Arsenal striker Gabriel Jesus was stretchered off during the first half of Sunday’s FA Cup clash against Manchester United. The Brazilian picked up the injury while attempting to challenge Bruno Fernandes, just as the United captain was lining up a shot. Jesus immediately gestured to the bench, clearly in pain, and covered his face with […] The post Arsenal surely have to step up transfer efforts as star stretchered off vs Man United appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Harry Maguire at centre of Arsenal vs Man Utd brawl as FA Cup clash descends into chaos
arts.sum: Manchester United were involved in a furious FA Cup clash with Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium on Sunday with former Red Devils captain Harry Maguire at the heart of an angry incident

arts.ttl: 'What a finish!'- Fernandes scores great goal against Arsenal
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes puts Manchester United ahead against Arsenal in the FA Cup at Emirates stadium.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals what he has told Bukayo Saka as Arsenal injury reality clear
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has issued some guidance for star player Bukayo Saka as he faces a spell on the sidelines due to a hamstring injury sustained during the Gunners' emphatic 5-1 victory against Crystal Palace. When asked if Saka's injury was a result of the packed schedule, Arteta admitted uncertainty: "The answer is that we don't know.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus injury: Arsenal star stretchered off against Manchester United after Bruno Fernandes clash
arts.sum: Gunners dealing with new double blow with Riccardo Calafiori sidelined for heavyweight FA Cup third round tie

arts.ttl: Gabriel Jesus leaves Arsenal-Man Utd injured
arts.sum: Arsenal striker Gabriel Jesus left the FA Cup third round tie against Manchester United on a stretcher after being injured.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson's advice to Wayne Rooney comes back to haunt him after Plymouth sacking
arts.sum: A stark warning from former Manchester United boss Sir Alex Ferguson has rung true as Wayne Rooney finds himself out of work again after being sacked by Plymouth

arts.ttl: Man Utd handed Khvicha Kvaratskhelia boost
arts.sum: Antonio Conte has confirmed that Kvaratskhelia has asked to leave Napoli this month amid increasing speculation of a January transfer. Sport Italia have revealed that Napoli are interested in signing Alejandro Garnacho if Kvaratskhelia leaves the club in January, with Man Utd therefore potentially able to arrange a swap deal.

arts.ttl: Arsenal sustain fresh injury blow as attacker leaves on stretcher in Man United clash
arts.sum: Arsenal are dealt yet another attacking injury concern, as Gabriel Jesus comes off with a knee injury in the Gunners' FA Cup clash with Manchester United.
